title: Application Engineer, AI Physics
company_focus:
Digital engineering platform for HPC simulation and AI-
driven product development
description:
About Rescale

Rescale is pioneering the future of engineering and
scientific discovery. As the leader in digital engineering,
we’re transforming how products are developed—through
intelligent automation, applied AI, data management, and the
integration of the world’s largest network of engineering
and R&D applications. Joining Rescale means becoming part of
a diverse, collaborative, and mission-driven team that’s
unlocking faster innovation across industries like
aerospace, energy, life sciences, and manufacturing. We’re
solving complex challenges that traditional HPC can’t—and
we’re seeking passionate, curious minds to help build the
next wave of breakthroughs

We are seeking a highly motivated Application Engineer, AI
Physics to help build and deliver the next generation of AI
Physics capabilities at Rescale!

This is a hands-on, builder-oriented role that sits at the
intersection of product development, applied AI, and
customer engineering workflows.

You will work directly with the Rescale AI/ML team to build
and ship AI Physics capabilities, while also engaging with
customers to apply those capabilities to real simulation
data and workflows. The role is customer-facing, but
product-first: your work with customers is expected to feed
directly back into reusable product features and
capabilities.

This role is ideal for engineers who enjoy working deep in
the codebase, pressure-testing new technology with real
users, and turning early prototypes into scalable product
capabilities.

In This Role, You Will Be Responsible For:

- Build and ship AI Physics capabilities alongside the Rescale
  AI/ML team
- Turn real customer simulation data into AI-ready pipelines
  using the core AI Physics product
- Execute and harden early AI Physics POCs so they are
  repeatable, reusable, and production-ready
- Debug and resolve issues across data preprocessing, models,
  inference, and workflow orchestration
- Work directly with customer engineers to understand their
  workflows and technical constraints
- Close gaps between customer workflows and product
  capabilities, feeding concrete learnings back into the
  product roadmap
- Act as a builder first, with the ability to be forward-
  deployed on critical customer engagements when needed

Key Qualifications:

- Strong software engineering fundamentals, with heavy
  emphasis on Python
- Hands-on experience with ML or data-driven systems in
  production contexts
- Familiarity with simulation workflows and engineering data
- Experience building and modifying data pipelines and ML
  workflows
- Ability to debug complex issues across data, models, and
  workflow orchestration
- Comfortable working directly with customer engineers on
  technical problems

Customer Engagement & Travel

- This role includes direct customer engagement, particularly
  during POCs and early deployments
- Expect occasional travel to customer sites for deep
  technical working sessions, workshops, or critical
  milestones
- Travel is purposeful and tied to execution, not routine
  sales support

Why This Role Matters

AI Physics Application Engineers play a critical role in
ensuring that AI Physics capabilities are not only
technically sound, but also usable, scalable, and trusted by
engineering teams. Your work will directly influence product
direction, customer adoption, and the success of AI Physics
deployments in production.

Rescale is an equal opportunities employer and welcomes
applications from all qualified persons regardless of their
race, sex, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation
or age. As part of our standard hiring process for new
employees, employment with Rescale will be contingent upon
successful completion of a comprehensive background check.
Here at Rescale, we are committed to being transparent in
our policies around candidate privacy. For more details on
the information Rescale collects in your application, please
view the Rescale Applicant Privacy Policy here.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building and shipping AI Physics
capabilities, working with AI/ML pipelines, debugging models
and inference, and hardening AI POCs for production. While
customer-facing, it's a builder role focused on deploying
and refining AI systems, not just supporting them.
